items.title: Buy, Hold, or Take Profits in Alphabet Stock Near All-Time Highs?
items.description: As the fourth company on the U.S. stock exchanges to hit a $3 trillion market cap, Alphabet stock hit another all-time high of $253 a share in Tuesday's trading session (post-split basis).

items.title: Why Apple Stock Inched Higher on Tuesday
items.description: A fresh take on the company pushed its shares up higher on the second trading day of the week.

items.title: Tracking Bruce Berkowitz's Fairholme Portfolio - Q2 2025 Update
Trump Extends Deadline to Get TikTok Deal Until December 16
items.description: Trump on Tuesday signed an executive order to again provide more time to finalize the sale for the popular video-sharing app, following recent talks between US and Chinese negotiators that led to a framework agreement.  The president earlier Tuesday told reporters he had “a deal on TikTok” with the Chinese as he departed the White House for a state visit to the UK, but declined to name the companies involved.  Trump is expected to speak on Friday with Chinese leader Xi Jinping about the plan.

items.title: Why Is Jamf (JAMF) Stock Soaring Today
items.description: Shares of apple device management company Jamf (NASDAQ:JAMF) jumped 7.1% in the afternoon session after an analyst reiterated a positive rating on the stock amid reports the company is exploring a sale.
